title: Too Late (FAWY)
lyrics: Too much, too little, too late to be fucked around with you Oh, too much, too little, too late for me and you Too much, too little, too late for me to fuck around with you Ask your friends, they already know what I can do Too much, too little, too late to be fucked around with you It's too much, it's too little, can't fuck around with you Sitting out talking a lot, I don't know if you get low It's how I feel when I'm with you It's like I can't breathe when I'm with you I can't do no more with you, no more with you I can't take my time with you, my time with you I can't love him like you do, thank you to me So girl, I can't fuck with you Too much, too little, too late for me to fuck around with you You make me blue with all the controlling that you do It seems so simple to me, every time I fuck around with you It's too much, it's too little, too late for me to fuck around with you I can't understand why you don't understand the lines of time And how much we know each other, and how much it means How much it means, the degrees and levels of love It's too much, too little, too late for me to fuck around with you I know no matter what I do Fuckin' with them niggas downtown I ain't seen you around in a while If you ask me, quit fuckin' with them niggas downtown It seems so simple to me It ain't simple to you

lyricsSegments.text: Too much, too little, too late to be fucked around with you
Oh, too much, too little, too late for me and you
Too much, too little, too late for me to fuck around with you
Ask your friends, they already know what I can do
Too much, too little, too late to be fucked around with you
It's too much, it's too little, can't fuck around with you
Sitting out talking a lot, I don't know if you get low
It's how I feel when I'm with you
It's like I can't breathe when I'm with you
I can't do no more with you, no more with you
I can't take my time with you, my time with you
I can't love him like you do, thank you to me
So girl, I can't fuck with you
Too much, too little, too late for me to fuck around with you
You make me blue with all the controlling that you do
It seems so simple to me, every time I fuck around with you
It's too much, it's too little, too late for me to fuck around with you
I can't understand why you don't understand the lines of time
And how much we know each other, and how much it means
How much it means, the degrees and levels of love
It's too much, too little, too late for me to fuck around with you
I know no matter what I do
Fuckin' with them niggas downtown
I ain't seen you around in a while
If you ask me, quit fuckin' with them niggas downtown
It seems so simple to me
It ain't simple to you
